overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a character in green robes walking through a gothic castle interior. The character moves from a portrait-lined gallery through a long vaulted corridor with ornate ceilings, approaching a wooden door at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: portrait gallery with gothic archway exit

events.description: character walks through the gothic archway from the gallery into the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the portrait gallery toward the stone archway leading deeper into the castle

stone wall covered with framed portraits in gothic frames
large pointed stone archway leading to the corridor beyond
decorative patterned rug covering the marble floor

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a portrait gallery with paintings lining both walls, walking toward a prominent gothic archway. The marble floor is partially covered by an ornate rug as the character approaches and passes through the archway into the corridor beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: long gothic corridor with vaulted painted ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the long corridor beneath the ornate vaulted ceiling

entered.detail: intricately painted gothic vaulted ceiling with stone ribs and decorative patterns
tall stone walls with columns and architectural details
large ornate stone vase containing a leafy plant

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a long, dimly lit gothic corridor with an elaborately painted vaulted ceiling overhead. A large decorative vase with a plant stands on the right side as the character walks toward the bright light at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor end with wooden door and side window

events.description: character slows and stops in front of the wooden door at the corridor's end

agents.ego_description: approaching the wooden door and coming to a halt, facing the door

entered.detail: large wooden door with metal studs and gothic arched top
tall narrow gothic window letting in natural light
wall-mounted light fixture above the door

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the end of the corridor where a large wooden door stands beneath a wall sconce. Natural light streams through a tall arched window on the right as the character slows and stops before the door, completing the journey through the gothic hallway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic castle interior that transitions from a curated portrait gallery into a long, vaulted corridor. It begins with the character walking across a marble floor and an ornate rug, passing through a prominent gothic archway that leads away from the painting-lined walls. As the character proceeds, the scene shifts into a dimly lit hallway characterized by an elaborately painted vaulted ceiling and a large decorative vase standing to the right. The camera then follows the character toward a growing glow at the corridor's end, where natural light begins to stream through a tall arched window. Finally, the movement slows as the character reaches a large wooden door positioned beneath a wall sconce, bringing the journey through the hallway to a stop.
